body:
I've created an example that looks at the instability of a Bickley jet and have some questions.

1.  To compute `u` from `uh` and `h` we need to first interpolate `uh` onto the cell centres.  Is there a function that does this?
2. In this [line](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/blob/a9c88dca8f138f12585bde49719283406720ec31/examples/swm_bickley_jet.jl#L84) I would like to subtract off a function.  What I tried does not work.  How should one do this?

The plots aren't worth looking at but help will these two will enable me to make a nice animation, sometime.


@navidcy edit: preview of docs at https://clima.github.io/OceananigansDocumentation/previews/PR1305/
title: Shallow Water Model Bickley Jet Example
